name: Protein Loading Buffer (Non-Reducing)
nameCn: 蛋白上样缓冲液 (非还原型)

notes.en: No β-mercaptoethanol or DTT. Use for non-reducing SDS-PAGE: preserves disulfide bonds, suitable for detecting multimers, intact IgG heavy/light chains, or ligand-receptor complexes. Mix 1:1 with sample and heat at 70°C for 10 min (do not boil to avoid aggregation).
notes.zh: 不含 β-巯基乙醇或 DTT。用于非还原 SDS-PAGE：保留二硫键，适合检测多聚体、IgG 重/轻链不分离、或配体-受体复合物。与样品 1:1 混合后 70°C 加热 10 min (不要煮沸，避免聚集)。

usage.en: Non-reducing SDS-PAGE loading buffer for analyzing disulfide-bonded proteins.
usage.zh: 非还原 SDS-PAGE 上样缓冲液，用于分析含二硫键蛋白。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve SDS in 1 M Tris-HCl pH 6.8.
Bring to final volume of 10 mL with ddH₂O (no reducing agent).
